item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
nick cave everybody
must be a lot to take in
yo quiero taco bell
disgusting
cool fact
i guess
we've all been there
what kinda fish is on the left?
every single one
this was me a long time ago
you can call me ray, or you can call me jay..
impressive
as your lawyer i advise you to not do this
looks like face drugs
such a great action movie
alright that's weird
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Siegfried & Joy
item.description:
I follow them on social media for a daily dose of serotonin and oxytocin.
They're also outspoken antifascists and hate the afd, which makes them regular dudes in my book.

item.title: The last time I posted about my dad in the hospital was in 2020 and I was effing traumatized. This time was 100% different thankfully.
item.description: People shit on how slow our health care system can be but when it’s a real, real, REAL emergency they get the job done. I am so incredibly thankful.

item.title: What Happened Today #30
item.description: Even Sundays aren't exempt from shakeups. The US stopped cyberops against Russia, sidelined a senior USAID voice warning that aid cuts cost lives, and ordered agencies to sidestep environmental and transparency laws. Military aid and crypto moves added fuel to today's chaos. Review & share with your people. #resist #GovBriefToday Your links are below. 1 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/defense-secretary-pete-hegseth-orders-halt-offensive-cyber-operations-rcna194435 2 - https://www.spokesman.com/stories/2025/mar/02/senior-usaid-official-ousted-after-detailing-probl/ 3 - https://www.reuters.com/world/rubio-signs-declaration-expedite-delivery-4-billion-military-aid-israel-2025-03-02/ 4 - https://www.cbsnews.com/news/scott-bessent-treasury-secretary-ukraine-economic-deal-face-the-nation/ 5 - https://apnews.com/article/trudeau-canada-king-charles-trump-5140e841c40e394bba21c2619534aa7c 6 - https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/02/trump-announces-strategic-crypto-reserve-including-bitcoin-solana-xrp-and-more.html 7 - https://www.straitstimes.com/world/now-its-log-baby-log-as-trump-eyes-us-national-forests 8 - https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/sb0038 9 - https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/02/johnson-stopgap-funding-bill-doge-cuts-00206881 Fighting Back - https://techcrunch.com/2025/03/01/mark-cuban-offers-to-fund-government-tech-unit-that-was-cut-in-the-middle-of-the-night/?g Archive - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: This is Gunnar Gran, CEO of Haltbakk Bunkers, one of Norway’s largest fuel companies. His company has announced that they will stop providing fuel to the U.S. until Trump supports Ukraine.
item.description: Be like Gunnar!

item.title: Help me, Imgur. Tiny octopus is trapped.
item.description: It's been an hour. Have to pee. Hungry. Everything is going dark... Is this how it ends? It's been a good life.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Instagram is actively protecting overtly racist comments
item.description: Yet they shadow-ban anyone who speaks about the ongoing Palestinian genocide. If nothing is done we'll see lynchings do a comeback in our lifetime. FUCK META, FUCK GOOGLE, FUCK X, FUCK MICROSOFT and all the lame tech bros who think they are above us!
item.dc:creator: electricwizard

item.description: Because you should. Siya Kolisi ( captain of the Sharks and South African rugby teams) meets a young fan. No, you're crying! Apologies for terrible music, not mine!

item.title: And the did it again! This time 838 miles (1350km) from the frontline. A Ukrainian long range drone hit Ufa oil refinery. Farthest hit .. so far.
item.description: There are several complexes under the common name "Bashneft" in Ufa: The oil refining complex of Bashneft includes three production sites - "Bashneft-UNPZ", "Bashneft-Novoil" and "Bashneft-Ufaneftekhim" - with a total capacity of 23.5 million tons per year.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

I use to work at a Starbucks.. something is ALWAYS brewing in there
Teehee
I’m bisexual which means I’m attracted to men who are attracted to me and I don’t want to be attracted to men that are attracted to me. Wut?
My cuddle pug

cozy

item.title: dump, from an ass
item.description:
maybe a little ranch too
this seems chill
look up the story behind this song, its strange
this had no business making me laugh as much as it did
HOLD ME NOW
*pfffffftttttt*
well, more than a mile
I know that's right
gonna get a big dish of beef chow mein
this and a glass of milk
my fat boy loves balloons. have a good week
item.dc:creator: pantsforever

item.title: Mjonday. We dont like them because a weekend isn't long enough anymore. So here's the 274sh eromeme album to extend it just a lil bit.
item.description:
The specifics of why the weekend isn't long enough anymore shall be saved for another account. Gotta keep this one hornry and pure. As usual, no eromeme OC, just things I found in the garage over the time off. And...I shouldn't *have* to say it, but I feel like some people see these and think, "What's the shittiest way I can interpret these memes?" So imma tell you now. CONSENT IS MANDATORY. 100% ALL THE TIME. For the purpose of memes, consent is implied as being satisfied. Maybe next week, my wholesome message will be on critical reading, but I had something planned for this week.
*horny quacking noises*
Cropped from questionablecontent.net
Ok. I'm feisty this morning. Let's talk about *accountability*. I fucked up last Friday. Left work early because I wasn't able to focus. Went home and played Minecraft while I wrapped up my shift. D8d two things poorly instead on one thing halfway poorly. I called it a mental health thing because it was. But as a result, I have more stress coming in today because I didn't get enough done. Now. Can I handle it? You betcha. Would I be able to bitch if I couldn't or if I miss a deadline this week because of it? Not a chance. I made that gamble. Consequences are mine and mine alone. That's accountability. We need to have accountability. You don't have to be perfect ar everything all the time. But you *NEED* to be able to say, "I was not capable," "I didn't prioritize that," "I did not want to do that," "I fucked up," "I am sorry," or something along those lines and then accept the punishment is your fault and your onus to bear. We cannot continue coexisting in a world where our mistakes or deliberate actions are someone elses problem to fix. Start with yourself. Hold yourself accountable for your actions, or your *re*actions, and be ready for the repercussions. And then stand up and demand others do the same thing. Anyway, heres the archive! May your way be Green and Golden. https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG
item.dc:creator: Icouri
